name: blisterwood-flail-max-melee
_note: Upstream maxHit comes from getDistribution().getMax(): the Blisterwood-flail vampyre damage bonus (scaleDamage(5,4), PlayerVsNPCCalc.ts:1798-1800) is applied in the distribution pipeline, NOT in getPlayerMaxMeleeHit/getMinAndMax. getMinAndMax().max() is 44; 44*5/4 = 55. As of v0.1.4 the distribution path is ported, so this row RUNS and asserts maxHit=55 via getMax(). Expected value left verbatim.
